description_long: This object is a modern rifle with a streamlined, elongated body and a distinct barrel extending from the front. The main body appears to be constructed from a dark, matte metal, with a stock at the rear for shoulder support and a pistol grip for handling. The magazine is positioned below the receiver, likely detachable, and the barrel is relatively thin and straight, suggesting a standard or light profile. The rifle features a simple iron sight system mounted on top, with no visible optics or advanced sighting devices. The muzzle end does not show any prominent attachments such as a suppressor or muzzle brake. Overall, the design is utilitarian and compact, suitable for urban environments.
description: A compact, modern rifle with a dark metal finish, detachable magazine, and iron sights. The design is streamlined and utilitarian, with a standard barrel and no visible muzzle device.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, including the stock, pistol grip, magazine, and barrel.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the narrow profile of the barrel and the alignment of the iron sights.
description_view_2: Opposite side view similar to view 0, showing the magazine and overall silhouette.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the stock and the back of the receiver, with the barrel barely visible.
